name: stock-monitor-skill
tagline: ClawHub (69★): 全功能智能股票监控预警系统。支持成本百分比、均线金叉死叉、RSI超买超卖、成交量异动、跳空缺口、动态止盈等7大预警规则。符合中国投资者习惯（红涨绿跌）。
verdict: No failure handling anywhere: if the daemon fails to start, price data is missing, or a stock code is invalid, the skill offers no guidance. It also risks duplicate background monitors by never checking for an already-running instance, and states no scope boundaries.

highlights.summary: No mention anywhere of what happens if the daemon fails to start, price data is unavailable, network fetch fails, or a stock code is invalid — total silence on failure handling acr
Starting the background daemon is a mutating/persistent action with no mention of detecting an already-running instance before starting again — re-running risks duplicate monitorin
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill text anywhere in description or body, despite being a fairly broad multi-feature system.
